findings.title: AWS access key ID
findings.recommendation: Remove the secret from source, rotate it immediately, and load it from an environment variable or secret manager.

findings.title: flask 0.12.2 - GHSA-5wv5-4vpf-pj6m
findings.description: Flask before 1.0 has a denial of service / request smuggling issue.

findings.title: requests 2.19.0 - CVE-2018-18074
findings.description: requests before 2.20.0 sends an HTTP Authorization header to a redirected http URL.

findings.title: subprocess called with shell=True
findings.recommendation: Pass an argument list and shell=False to avoid command injection.

findings.title: TLS certificate verification disabled
findings.recommendation: Re-enable certificate verification; disabling it allows MITM attacks.

findings.title: Unsafe yaml.load()
findings.recommendation: Use yaml.safe_load() to avoid arbitrary object construction.

findings.title: jinja2 2.10 - CVE-2019-10906
findings.description: Jinja2 before 2.10.1 has a sandbox escape via str.format_map.

findings.title: Weak hash algorithm (MD5/SHA1)
findings.recommendation: Use SHA-256+ for integrity, and a KDF (bcrypt/argon2) for passwords.
